ddt:Target.Name: RBMS_SCPU_6XX_7XX_XFK_V1.0
ddt:Target.Description:
Auteur: Adina JOITA ----------------------------------------------
DIDs List: S_DID_Database(4.0) DTCs List: BMS_DTCs_database (5.2) Base de reference: RBMS SCPU
---------------------------------------------- RBMS_SCPU_6XX_7XX_XFK_V1.0 ---------------------------------------------------------- -Name changed from RBMS_SCPU_AS00_6XX_V1.0 to RBMS_SCPU_6XX_7XX_XFK_V1.0; -AutoIdent removed for all AS versions; -AutoIdent added for KC00 with the following versions: 0650 to 0655, 0660 to 0665, 0700 to 0705, 0710 to 0715, 0720 to 0725 with VDiag $07; -DID $925F had been added; -This database is according with spec S_DID_Database(4.2).
RBMS_SCPU_AS00_6xx_V2.0(OCO): Added DIDs:$9007$9008$9009$900A$9013$9014$925A$925B$9281 Modified $F187 to RW, adding $F0A0 an $F0A5 (RW) Adding VDiag $04 for 650_AS00 Created FOTA screen
RBMS_SCPU_AS00_6xx_V1.2(ARA) -DID $925E modified -Added VDiag $45 ,FOR SW 611_AS00 ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData.Mileage, ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData.DTCTravelledDistanceFailurePresent, ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData.DTCLastDiseappearMileage, ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData.DTCFirstAppearMileage
RBMS_SCPU_AS00_6xx_V1.1(ARA) Added RIDs $$02A0,$02A4. -Added Vdaig $45 601_AS00, 610_AS00,
RBMS_SCPU_AS00_6xx_V1.0(MBL) -Adding VDiag $45 ,FOR SW 600_AS00 -Add of DID $925E
RBMS_SCPU_SW4xx_5xx_V2.0 (OCO): Adding VDiag for SW520-550-511-512-513
RBMS_SCPU_SW4xx_5xx_V1.0 (OCO): Added DID $925D Modified DID $91FE--> state01; Correction $9129-start byte Modified DID $F197--32 bytes Correction SCREEN IRDD I/O W button for $9204 Update DTC_base to 5.2 Added VDiag $07 $08 $45 for sw 400/410/450/500/510
RBMS_SCPU_V6.0 (CDI): -Remove from autoidentification the SW versions > 500 for all Vdiag; -Add e2cad, E2CAD & e2-cad supplier -Removed XFB project; -Add BJA & XFBPh2 projects; -Added DIDs: $9000; $9020; $9040; $9060; $9080; $90A0; $90C0; $90E0; $9100; $9120; $9140; $9160; $9180; $91A0; $91C0; $91E0; $9200; $9220; $9240; $9260; $9280; $92A0; $92C0; $92E0; $9300; $9320; $9340; $9360; $9380; $93A0; $93C0; $93E0; $9400; $9420; $9440; $9460; $9480; $94A0; $94C0; $94E0; $9500; $9520; $9540; $9560; $9580; $95A0; $95C0; $95E0; $9600; $9620; $9640; $9660; $9680; $96A0; $96C0; $96E0; $9700; $9720; $9740; $9760; $9780; $97A0; $97C0; $97E0; $9800; $9820; $9840; $9860; $9880; $98A0; $98C0; $98E0; $9900; $9920; $9940; $9960; $9980; $99A0; $99C0; $99E0; $9A00; $9A20; $9A40; $9A60; $9A80; $9AA0; $9AC0; $9AE0; $9B00; $9B20; $9B40; $9B60; $9B80; $9BA0; $9BC0; $9BE0; $9C00; $9C20; $9C40; $9C60; $9C80; $9CA0; $9CC0; $9CE0; $9D00; $9D20; $9D40; $9D60; $9D80; $9DA0; $9DC0; $9DE0; $9E00; $9E20; $9E40; $9E60; $9E80; $9EA0; $9EC0; $9EE0; $9F00; $9F20; $9F40; $9F60; $9F80; $9FA0; $9FC0; $9FE0; $F000; $F020; $F100; $F120; -Added DIDs: $920A; $9261; $9262; -Added DTCs: $1B00; $1B01; $1B02; $1B03; $1B04; $1B05; $1B06; $1B07; $1B08; $1B09; $1B0A; $1B0B; $1B0C; $1B0D; $1B0E; $1B10; $1B12; $1B14; $1B15; $1B16; $1B17; $1B18; $1B19; $1B1A; $1B1B; $1B1C; $1B1D; $1B1E; $1B1F; $1B20; $1B21; $1B30; $1B31; $1B32; $1B33; $1B34; $1B35; $1B36; $1B37; $1B38; $1B39; $1B3A; $1B3B; $1B3C; $1B3D; $1B3E; $1B3F; $1B40; $1B41; $1B42; $1B43; $1B44; $1B45; $1B46; $1B47; $1B48; $1B49; $1B4A; $1B4B; $1B4C; $1B4D; $1B4E; $1B4F; $1B60; $1B61; $1B62; $1B63; $1B64; $1B65; $1B66; $1B67; $1B68; $1B69; $1B6A; $1B6B; $1B6C; $1B6D; $1B6E; $1B6F; $1B70; $1B71; $1B72; $1B73; $1B74; $1B80; $1B81; $1B82; $1B83; -Update DIDs: $F197; $91B8;
RBMS_SCPU_V5.0 (AJO) Added Auto Ident for VRROG ZL00/PL00 VDiag $07/ $08 for NPROG 4100 4500 4530 4540 4550 5000 5010 5020 5030 5040 5050 5100 5110 5120 5130 5200 5220 5230 5240 5500 5510 5520 5530 5210
RBMS_SCPU_V4.0 (AJO) Added Auto-ident 450_ZL10 ; ZL00 VDiag $07 PL00; PL10VDiag $08 HH00; AS00; KC00 VDiag $45 Updated DID list conform with S_DID_Database(1.9) Updated DTC list conform with BMS_DTCs_database (5.1)
RBMS_SCPU_V3.1 (AJO) -Added read request for $F012; $F010

Data.Name: RoutineControlType
Data.Comment: Routine control type - VALUES OTHER THAN 1, 2 & 3 ARE RESERVED AND SHOULD NOT BE USED.

Data.Name: MemoryAddress.16bits
Data.Comment: For ReadMemoryByAddress with 16 bits memory address

Data.Name: MemoryAddress.24bits
Data.Comment: For ReadMemoryByAddress with 24 bits memory address

Data.Name: MemoryAddress.32bits
Data.Comment: For ReadMemoryByAddress with 32 bits memory address

Data.Name: MemorySize.8bits
Data.Comment: For ReadMemoryByAddress with 8 bits length for memory size

Data.Name: MemorySize.16bits
Data.Comment: For ReadMemoryByAddress with 16 bits length for memory size

Data.Name: IOCTL.DataIdentifier
Data.Comment: Data Identifier received in reply to InputOutputControl request

Data.Name: RoutineIdentifierList
Data.Comment: Routine identifier - This is an example. See documentation for more information.
Data.Description:
Definition of RoutineControl

Data: RoutineIdentifierList

  Contains the list of all routine identifier that may be used with InputOutputControl service.
 
  Example:
  
    0x4501 - ROUTINE_Temperature_Wave

If some of these routine identifer have parameters, you should defined a data with the same name as the routine identifer followed by a dot and a text

  Example:
 
  Data: ROUTINE_Temperature_Wave.Min
  Data: ROUTINE_Temperature_Wave.Max
  Data: ROUTINE_Temperature_Wave.Freq

Then, you should add theses data in the "Send tab" of the RoutineControl request, after the RoutineIdentifierList data.

Item.Text: Device and failure type ODB codding
circuit short to ground or open
circuit short to battery or open
signal rate of change below threshold
signal rate of change above threshold
signal bias level out of range / zero adj. failure
signal has too few transitions / events
signal has too many transitions / events
alive / sequence counter incorrect / not updated
value of signal protection calculation incorrect
Component or sys. operation obstructed or blocked
half of thermistor in SCG. Performance is degraded
half thermistor in SCB or OC. Performance is degraded
LV Power Supply is too low
LV Power Supply is too high
Cell Wire Impendance Out of Range
No signal can be read from FAN
1 thermistor in deviation (compare to other thermistors)
Invalid data received on CAN Current sensor frames
Missing frame(s) from CAN Current sensor
Bus OFF on CAN transceiver (Main CPU)
Temp1 value is over the limit threshold
Temp1 value is under the limit threshold
Battery pack temperature is over the functionnal threshold (derating)

Data.Name: DTCFormatIdentifier
Data.Comment: DTC format - Renault/Nissan use value 0 (3 bytes DTC)

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.DTCOccurrenceCounter
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData DTCOccurenceCounter (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: Spare SCPU ANA input (Hot Spot Temp) (Wxx_raw_hspt_temp)

Item.Text: No possible classification about the type of fault

Data.Name: vehicleManufacturerSparePartNumber
Data.Description:
This value shall be used to reference the vehicle manufacturer spare part number.

Record data content and format shall be server specific and defined by the vehicle manufacturer.

Data.Name: VIN
Data.Description:
This value shall be used to reference the VIN number.

Record data content and format shall be specified by the vehicle manufacturer.

It shall not be erased when the ECU is reprogrammed.

Data.Name: vehicleManufacturerECUHardwareNumber
Data.Description:
This value shall be used by reading services to reference the vehicle-manufacturer-specific ECU (server) hardware number.

Record data content and format shall be serverspecific and defined by vehicle manufacturer.

Data.Name: diagnosticVersion
Data.Description:
This value shall be used to reference the diagnostic version of the ECU.

It is defined by the vehicle manufacturer.

Refer to manufacture ECU designer.

Data.Name: OperationalReference(Ref C if available or Ref B then 0 if no Ref)
DTCExtendedData.Mileage
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData Mileage (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.DTCTravelledDistanceFailurePresent
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData Mileage (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.DTCFirstAppearMileage
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData Mileage (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.DTCLastDiseappearMileage
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData Mileage (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: systemSupplierECUSoftwareNumber
Data.Description:
This value shall be used to reference the system supplier specific ECU (server) software number.

Record data content and format shall be server specific and defined by the system supplier.

Data.Name: systemSupplierECUSoftwareVersionNumber
Data.Description:
This value shall be used to reference the system supplier specific ECU (server) software version number.

Record data content and format shall be server specific and defined by the system supplier.

Request.Name: TesterPresent.WithResponse
Request.Comment: This request enable P2P tester present for tool (Screen, IOctl, ...)

Request.Name: StartDiagnosticSession.ExtendedDiagnostic
Request.Comment: Standard definition for DDT2000 automatic screen

Request.Name: StartDiagnosticSession.Default
Request.Comment: Standard definition for DDT2000 automatic screen

Request.Name: StartDiagnosticSession.Programming
Request.Comment: Standard definition for DDT2000 automatic screen

Request.Name: ClearDiagnosticInformation.All
Request.Comment: The ClearDiagnosticInformation service is used by the tool to clear diagnostic information in an ECUs memory

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportDTC
Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests / DDT : Unusable for Clip import

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportSnapshot
Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests / Clip import : Unusable in the standard tools of DDT2000

Request.Name: RoutineControl
Request.Comment: You should remove ROUTINE_Temperature_Wave.xxx data. These are examples.

Request.Name: ReadMemoryByAddress.32x8
Request.Comment: Read Memory By Address with address coded on 32 bits and data length coded on 8 bits

Request.Name: ReadMemoryByAddress.32x16
Request.Comment: Read Memory By Address with address coded on 32 bits and data length coded on 16 bits

Request.Name: ReadMemoryByAddress.24x8
Request.Comment: Read Memory By Address with address coded on 24 bits and data length coded on 8 bits

Request.Name: ReadMemoryByAddress.24x16
Request.Comment: Read Memory By Address with address coded on 24 bits and data length coded on 16 bits

Request.Name: ReadMemoryByAddress.16x8
Request.Comment: Read Memory By Address with address coded on 16 bits and data length coded on 8 bits

Request.Name: ReadMemoryByAddress.16x16
Request.Comment: Read Memory By Address with address coded on 16 bits and data length coded on 16 bits

Request.Name: ReportDTCInformation.ReportDTCFaultDetectionCounter_CPDD Import
Request.Comment: Report DTC fault detection counter counter for Clip import

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportSupportedDTC_CPDD Import
Request.Comment: Report supported DTC for Clip import

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportDTC_CPDD Import
Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests / Clip import : Unusable in the standard tools of DDT

Request.Name: StartDiagnosticSession.Supplier
Request.Comment: Standard definition for DDT2000 automatic screen

Request.Name: RoutineControl_Start_ResetSM1
Request.Comment: SM1 flag reset for full UDS LGC

Request.Name: RoutineControl_BMSChangeUpdateCommand
Request.Comment: This routine is used when the BMS is changed on the pack but the battery is conserved.

Request.Name: RoutineControl_BatteryCellChangeUpdateCommand
Request.Comment: The aim of this routine is to reinitialize the battery states learning.

Request.Name: DataRead.P0VP_IRDD - 0 or 60V IRDD Bypass value (Wbx_hv_iso_supply_ctl_byp_val)
Request.Comment: Read P0VP_IRDD - 0 or 60V IRDD Bypass value (Wbx_hv_iso_supply_ctl_byp_val)

Request.Name: DataWrite.P0VP_IRDD - 0 or 60V IRDD Bypass value (Wbx_hv_iso_supply_ctl_byp_val)
Request.Comment: Write P0VP_IRDD - 0 or 60V IRDD Bypass value (Wbx_hv_iso_supply_ctl_byp_val)

Request.Name: DataRead.Spare SCPU ANA input (Hot Spot Temp) (Wxx_raw_hspt_temp)
Request.Comment: Read Spare SCPU ANA input (Hot Spot Temp) (Wxx_raw_hspt_temp)

DataItem.Name: Spare SCPU ANA input (Hot Spot Temp) (Wxx_raw_hspt_temp)

Request.Name: DataRead.OperationalReference(Ref C if available or Ref B then 0 if no Ref)
Request.Comment: Read OperationalReference(Ref C if available or Ref B then 0 if no Ref)

DataItem.Name: OperationalReference(Ref C if available or Ref B then 0 if no Ref)

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData.Mileage
Request.Comment: Request for the import in the Clip

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData.DTCTravelledDistanceFailurePresent
Request.Comment: Request for the import in the Clip

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData.DTCOccurrenceCounter
Request.Comment: Request for the import in the Clip

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData.DTCLastDiseappearMileage
Request.Comment: Request for the import in the Clip

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData.DTCFirstAppearMileage
Request.Comment: Request for the import in the Clip

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData
Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests : Unusable in the standard tools of DDT2000 nor for Clip import

Request.Name: DataRead.Number of Maximum Cell Voltage
Request.Comment: Read Number of Maximum Cell Voltage

Request.Name: DataRead.Number of Minimum Cell Voltage
Request.Comment: Read Number of Minimum Cell Voltage

Request.Name: DataRead.Index of thermistor with max_temperature_value
Request.Comment: Read Index of thermistor with max_temperature_value

Request.Name: DataRead.Index of thermistor with min_temperature_value
Request.Comment: Read Index of thermistor with min_temperature_value

Test.Description: Power supply voltage (12V) is under acceptable threshold
Power supply voltage (12V) is above acceptable threshold
Cell Wire Impendance Out of Range
>= 1 thermistor is in SCB or OC. However, overall performance is OK
>= 1 thermistor is in SCG. However, overall performance is OK
>= 1 thermistor is in deviation (compare to other thermistors)
>half of thermistor is in SCB or OC. Performance is degraded
>half of thermistor is in SCG. Performance is degraded
>half of thermistor is in deviation (compare to other thermistors)
ASIC power supply is too low
Balancing switch openend or cell opened

Label.Text: 08 = Vehicle State check in progress for Configuration
Status Id are assigned to each FOTA status of Target ECU
